THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA JOSEPH D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAGE WARREN MR $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $429.00, PLTF TO REFUND BALANCE OF $414 TO DEFT FROM $814 DEPOSIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PAGE WARREN MR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GARCIA JOSEPH D HOWEVER CROSS PLTF WILL RECEIVE $414 FROM CROSS DEFT, AS PER ORIGINAL COMPLAINT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE WARREN MR
